name: AnalysisModelConnectivityRule
summary: The AnalysisModelConnectivityRule class contains information related to analysis model connectivity rules.

constructors.name: AnalysisModelConnectivityRule
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the AnalysisModelConnectivityRule class

methods.name: Select
methods.summary: Selects an analysis connectivity rule. The ID has to be set.

properties.name: AnalysisModelName
properties.summary: Gets or sets the analysis model name.

properties.name: AnalysisObjectType
properties.summary: Gets or sets the type of the analysis object.

properties.name: FatherObject2ID
properties.summary: Gets or sets the identifier of the father part.

properties.name: FatherObject2Type
properties.summary: Gets or sets the type of the father object.

properties.name: FatherObjectID
properties.summary: Gets or sets the identifier of the father part.

properties.name: FatherObjectType
properties.summary: Gets or sets the type of the father object.

properties.name: Group1
properties.summary: The group name 1 of the connectivity rule.

properties.name: Group2
properties.summary: The group name 2 of the connectivity rule.

properties.name: ID
properties.summary: Gets or sets the identifier of the analysis object.

properties.name: Linkage1
properties.summary: The linkage 1 of the connectivity rule.

properties.name: Linkage2
properties.summary: The linkage 2 of the connectivity rule.

properties.name: MagneticDistance
properties.summary: The magnetic distance of the connectivity rule.

properties.name: Status
properties.summary: The status of the connectivity rule.
